name: Plenty Wear And Tear Set
summary: This Plenty Wear and Tear Set includes everything needed to refresh and maintain the cleanliness of your Plenty Vaporiser.
description: This Plenty Wear and Tear Set includes everything needed to refresh and maintain the cleanliness of your Plenty Vaporiser. It is highly recommended for use after extended periods of usage, ensuring its longevity. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A clean device gives cleaner vapour and a more reliable dose.
